title: Delicate Syrian Broccoli Pilaf
description: A light and flavorful Syrian-inspired pilaf dish featuring tender broccoli and delicate spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the broccoli and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the pilaf, water, cumin, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover with a tight-fitting lid.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the pilaf is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in chopped parsley.
To toast the pilaf, cook in a dry skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently, until lightly browned and fragrant.
